usage: editCutWire [-help] [-only_visible_wires] [-selected] {-lines {x1 y1 x2 y2 ...} | [-box {x1 y1 x2 y2} [-delete_wire_in_box ]] }

options.name: -box
options.description: Specify the lower left and upper right coordinates of the cutting box

options.name: -lines
options.description: Specify the coordinates of both cutting lines ends

options.name: -only_visible_wires
options.description: Specify to cut visible wires only
